children.heading: .—Stock and Dividends
children.label: a .—Stock and Dividends
children.text: The corporation may not issue stock or declare or pay a dividend.

children.heading: .—Political Activities
children.label: b .—Political Activities
children.text: The corporation or a director or officer as such may not contribute to, support, or assist a political party or candidate for elective public office.
bona fide expenses of officers of the corporation in amounts approved by the board of directors; or
appropriate aid to blinded veterans or their widows or children in carrying out the purposes of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Loans
children.label: d .—Loans
children.text: The corporation may not make a loan to a director, officer, or employee. Directors and officers who vote for or assent to making a loan to a director, officer, or employee, and officers who participate in making the loan, are jointly and severally liable to the corporation for the amount of the loan until it is repaid.

children.heading: .—Immunity From Liability
children.label: e .—Immunity From Liability
children.text: Members and private individuals are not liable for the obligations of the corporation.
